comment.body:
Just tossing out an idea here (if we are gonna make a "normal" ABC to make the B-wave and then down to 6000 in a bigger C.
So, today we bounce at the 6272 level and go up a bit. Then fill the gap to make a bear-trap before going up hard to finally trap the bulls and then 6k. 
It will probably don't happen like this, so don't use it, but in case... :)

comment.body: Take a day or two off. Write down what you did and why, what was your mental state at the moment? And after your attempts failed? What signs did you pick (or not) pick up that could have prevented you from making secondary and tertiary mistakes?  If you know your mind is troubled, hard stop trading, start writing. Log that shit out of you.

comment.body: thank u.Just like every day, I took small-sized mean-reversion trades at the levels Alma gave and stuck to my tight stops—until yesterday. Each reversal got rejected, and when Alma finally gave signal I abandoned my stop discipline and took a big loss. Today, while trading the puts, I was scared of losing from the very first tick;  couldn’t think calmly the way I used to.I always follow the plan to trade, but when something happens that isn’t on the sheet, my reactions are painfully slow.
